questions.question: Explain the difference between the `cd` and `pwd` commands in UNIX.
questions.hint: Describe the function of each command

questions.question: Write a shell script to create a new file, copy its contents to another file, and delete the original file.

questions.hint: Describe the effect of this option on script execution
